parameters.formDescription: Tell us one skill you want to conquer - tech or non-tech - and your AI mentor will email you a complete mastery roadmap.

values.fieldLabel: Which skill do you want to master?
Where are you and how serious are you?

values.content:
=You are a world-class mentor who can teach ANY skill - technical or non-technical - and turn a complete beginner into an expert. Produce a beautifully designed, exceptionally detailed mastery roadmap as an HTML email with visual charts. Person's details: - Name: {{ $json['Your Name'] }} - Skill: {{ $json['Which skill do you want to master?'] }} - Profile (where they are + how serious): {{ $json['Where are you and how serious are you?'] }} The profile string tells you both their current level and weekly time. Read it carefully and tailor the difficulty, the 30-day plan, and the daily habit to BOTH signals. Be specific and concrete everywhere - real tools, real drills, real resources, real numbers. No vague filler. FIRST, work out these numbers - you will paste them into the charts: 1. currentLevelPercent: how far along the road to mastery they already are. "Just starting" ~5-10%, "Some basics" ~20-30%, "Intermediate" ~45-55%. Write as a percent string like 25%. 2. Practice hours to reach each stage, realistic for this skill: hoursBeginner, hoursIntermediate, hoursAdvanced, hoursMaster. Convert each to a bar width % out of hoursMaster (barMaster = 100%). Write each as a percent string. 3. Monthly income at three stages - incomeBeginner, incomeIntermediate, incomePro - as realistic rough figures. Convert each to a bar width % out of incomePro (incBarPro = 100%). Write each as a percent string. 4. difficultyPercent: how hard this skill is to learn (easy ~30%, moderate ~55%, hard ~80%). 5. demandPercent: how in-demand this skill is in the job/freelance market right now. 6. weeksToJob: roughly how many weeks of consistent effort at their pace until they could do paid work at a basic level. Every percent token in the template MUST become a real percentage string ending in % - never leave a [bracket] visible.

SKILL MASTERY BLUEPRINT

🎯 Master [Skill]

For [Name] Starting: [level]

🌟 THE BIG PICTURE

[One inspiring, honest sentence on what mastering this skill really means and why it is worth it.]

[2-3 sentences: a realistic view of the journey from their level to mastery and what the path looks like.]

HOW FAR ALONG YOU ALREADY ARE

[currentLevelPercent]
STARTMASTERY

📊 SKILL SNAPSHOT

LEARNING DIFFICULTY

MARKET DEMAND

⏱️ Time to first paid work: roughly [weeksToJob] weeks at your chosen pace.

🧩 WHAT THIS SKILL IS MADE OF

[One sentence: mastery is not one thing - it is a stack of these core sub-skills.]

🔹 [Sub-skill 1] - [why it matters]

🔹 [Sub-skill 2] - [why it matters]

🔹 [Sub-skill 3] - [why it matters]

🔹 [Sub-skill 4] - [why it matters]

🔹 [Sub-skill 5] - [why it matters]

🚀 HOW TO START - YOUR FIRST STEPS

1️⃣ [First step] - [what to actually do]

2️⃣ [Second step] - [what to actually do]

3️⃣ [Third step] - [what to actually do]

4️⃣ [Fourth step] - [what to actually do]

🪜 YOUR MASTERY PATH - 4 STAGES

From total beginner to top-tier. Each stage builds on the last.

STAGE WHAT YOU LEARN & CAN DO
🟢 Beginner [the foundations + what they can do by the end of this stage]
🔵 Intermediate [the next layer + what they can do by the end of this stage]
🟣 Advanced [professional-level skills + what they can do by the end of this stage]
🏆 Master / Ninja [the elite skills that separate the top 1% + what mastery looks like]

PRACTICE HOURS TO REACH EACH STAGE

🟢 Beginner
[hoursBeginner] h
🔵 Intermediate
[hoursIntermediate] h
🟣 Advanced
[hoursAdvanced] h
🏆 Master
[hoursMaster] h

📅 YOUR 30-DAY KICKSTART PLAN

Week 1[concrete focus + a practice goal]
Week 2[concrete focus + a practice goal]
Week 3[concrete focus + a practice goal]
Week 4[concrete focus + a practice goal]

🛠️ YOUR STARTER TOOLKIT

[One sentence on the basic setup, tools or kit a beginner needs - keep it low-cost and accessible.]

✅ [Tool/item 1] - [what it is for, free or paid]

✅ [Tool/item 2] - [what it is for, free or paid]

✅ [Tool/item 3] - [what it is for, free or paid]

🧰 TEMPLATES & FRAMEWORKS

📋 [Template/framework 1] - [what it is and how to use it]

📋 [Template/framework 2] - [what it is and how to use it]

📋 [Template/framework 3] - [what it is and how to use it]

🌀 DAILY PRACTICE HABIT

[One sentence: the small daily habit that compounds into mastery, sized to their weekly time.]

🔁 Daily ritual: [a specific repeatable practice routine they can do most days].

🥷 NINJA TRICKS - GO FROM GOOD TO ELITE

[One sentence: the insider edge that separates true experts from average practitioners.]

⚡ [Pro trick 1] - [the insider technique]

⚡ [Pro trick 2] - [the insider technique]

⚡ [Pro trick 3] - [the insider technique]

⚡ [Pro trick 4] - [the insider technique]

📚 BEST RESOURCES TO LEARN FROM

🎥 Watch: [specific channels, courses or video resources]

📖 Read: [specific books, blogs or documentation]

🛠️ Practice with: [specific tools, platforms or apps]

👥 Join: [specific communities, forums or groups]

🏅 PROVE YOU ARE GOOD - MILESTONES

[One sentence: skill is invisible until you show it - these are the proof-points that signal real ability.]

🎖️ [Milestone 1] - [a concrete thing to build, win or complete]

🎖️ [Milestone 2] - [a concrete thing to build, win or complete]

🎖️ [Milestone 3] - [a concrete thing to build, win or complete]

💼 WHERE YOU CAN USE THIS SKILL

[2-3 sentences: the real-world places, roles, industries and situations where this skill is valuable.]

🎯 In demand for: [3-4 specific roles, jobs or use cases]

💰 HOW TO MAKE MONEY FROM IT

[One sentence on earning potential and how soon a learner can realistically start.]

TYPICAL MONTHLY EARNINGS AS YOU GROW

Beginner
[incomeBeginner]
Intermediate
[incomeIntermediate]
Pro / Expert
[incomePro]

💵 [Earning path 1] - [how it works]

💵 [Earning path 2] - [how it works]

💵 [Earning path 3] - [how it works]

🔗 SKILL STACKING - 10X YOUR VALUE

[One sentence: pairing this skill with a few others makes you rare and far more valuable than mastering it alone.]

➕ [Complementary skill 1] - [why this combo is powerful]

➕ [Complementary skill 2] - [why this combo is powerful]

➕ [Complementary skill 3] - [why this combo is powerful]

⚠️ MISTAKES TO AVOID

🚫 [Common mistake 1 - and what to do instead]

🚫 [Common mistake 2 - and what to do instead]

🚫 [Common mistake 3 - and what to do instead]

🌟 YOUR FIRST 3 STEPS - START TODAY

1️⃣ [One small, specific action they can do in the next hour]

2️⃣ [A second small, specific action for this week]

3️⃣ [A third small, specific action for this week]

[One short, warm, motivating closing line addressed to the person by name.]

Prepared for [Name]

Skill Mastery Blueprint ✨ Powered by Gemini AI + n8n

RULES: - A cooking blueprint should be as rich as a coding one. Equal depth for any skill. - Income figures are realistic rough ranges, never promises. - Be warm and motivating, but honest about the real effort required. - Replace EVERY [placeholder] with real content - no brackets visible in the output. OUTPUT: - ONLY raw HTML. Nothing before or after. First character <, last character >. No markdown, no code fences, no commentary. One paste-time gotcha to watch for. When pasting into the Gemini node's Content field, make sure the field is in expression mode. If it's plain text, the AI sees {{ $json['Your Name'] }} as literal characters and writes a generic roadmap instead of a personalised one. If your test output looks generic - switch the field to expression mode and re-test. What makes this prompt special. This isn't a question - it's the complete email design handed to the AI as a template, with instructions to research the skill, calculate real numbers (how far along they are, hours to each mastery stage, their income curve), and paste those numbers straight into the bar charts. This is called template-driven prompting. It's how you get consistent, design-grade output every single time. Take a screenshot of this prompt - you'll use this pattern for the rest of your life.

parameters.subject: ={{ $('On form submission').item.json['Your Name'] }}, your Skill Mastery Blueprint is ready 🎯
